name: Mobile
summary: You are exceptionally speedy and agile. You gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You are exceptionally speedy and agile. You gain the following benefits:

items: When you use the Dash action, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement on that turn.
When you make a melee attack against a creature, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature for the rest of the turn, whether you hit or not.

highlights: When you use the Dash action, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement on that turn.
When you make a melee attack against a creature, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature for the rest of the turn, whether you hit or not.
